title: Set up Nginx as a Reverse Proxy
summary: Install and configure Nginx as a reverse proxy for a Node.js/Next.js app — including SSL via Certbot, gzip, rate limiting, and Docker Compose integration.
declaration: I will configure Nginx as a reverse proxy in front of your application. This covers server blocks, SSL termination via Let's Encrypt/Certbot, gzip compression, security headers, and optional Docker Compose integration. Tell me if you are running Nginx natively (systemd) or inside Docker.
